hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Lionfish in the wild
hero.caption: The Lionfish is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Lionfish navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Lionfish finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Lionfish.

baby.alt: A young or baby Lionfish showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Lionfishs must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Lionfishs interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Lionfishs interact with others of their species.

range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Lionfish
size.caption: The size of a Lionfish can vary depending on its age and environment.
